title: Removed legacy Assistant slash commands
body:
The `/settings` and `/rename` slash commands are no longer available in the notebook Genie Code Assistant chat pane. Adjust notebook settings and rename notebooks from the notebook UI instead.

Other slash commands, such as `/doc`, `/explain`, `/fix`, `/optimize`, and `/prettify`, are unchanged. See [Use slash commands for prompts](/aws/en/notebooks/code-assistant#use-slash-commands-for-prompts).
